pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires creating a folder named 'Threat-Financial'.
Task description explicitly requires creating a folder named 'Threat-Commercial'.
Task description explicitly requires drafting an email to 'intel-team@security-corp.com'.
Task description explicitly requires the subject 'Weekly Fraud Report'.
Task description explicitly requires moving 'at least 5 emails' into each of the target folders.

Confirmed these exact keywords act as the verifier's scoring rubric and perfectly align with the financial examples (advance fee scams, inheritance claims, lottery wins, fake bank alerts) given in the task description.

Confirmed these exact keywords act as the verifier's scoring rubric and perfectly align with the commercial examples (product advertisements, pharmaceuticals, software, newsletters) given in the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real email data from the Apache SpamAssassin Public Corpus. It has been verified that the agent must create 'Threat-Financial' and 'Threat-Commercial' folders and move at least 5 matching emails into each. A report draft must be addressed to 'intel-team@security-corp.com' with 'Fraud Report' in the subject. The scoring rubric specifically checks for subsets of financial keywords (e.g., bank, lottery, inheritance) and commercial keywords (e.g., software, pharmacy, newsletter) which closely align with the examples provided in the task description.
